title: Comics Vs Kids
description: Comics vs Kids returns with a show full of jokes, silliness, interaction and special guests. Have a laugh with the jovial, affable host and a selection of fringe comedians and maybe win some prizes in a quest to find out who is funnier and smarter, comedians or kids! An awesome time will be had by all. "An absolute joy of a show, enjoyed by the entire room" ★★★★★ (LagoonFest, Hove) "Super funny, super fun and charisma up the wazoo, Nik's awesome!" ★★★★ ½ (Melbourne International Comedy Festival) "Fast and funny... the audience loved it... sweetly, wildly hilarious" ★★★★ (Rip It Up, Adelaide Fringe) "Coppin is a great host" (Broadway Baby, Brighton Fringe 2025)
